javascript-typescript-support.details: Implements JS/TS cognitive complexity via tree-sitter-javascript@0.21.4 and tree-sitter-typescript@0.21.2. 14 unit tests, all passing.

notes: PR #164 (JS/TS support) is open/draft - CI pending. PR #161 (release 0.2.1) still open for maintainer. PR #166 (ci-coach CI optimization) open. Issue #163 (ci-coach) now has our comment pointing to PR #166. Next run: check if PR #164 CI passes, check if any issues need further triage, look for new enhancements to implement.
